concerns.text: Tasks T033–T037 implement 'Phase-Disaggregated Scoring' and 'Plasticity Metrics' (e.g., detecting strategy changes between negative results). These features are absent from spec.md and plan.md, which explicitly scope the feature to 'mechanical correctness' of the benchmark engine. This introduces orphan requirements and violates the Single Source of Truth (SSoT) principle by adding unapproved scope.

Tasks T038–T043 implement a 'Rule-Space Discovery' task (Cellular Automata) based on external reviewer comments. The spec.md and plan.md strictly limit scope to reproducing the vendored ResearchClawBench codebase. This task introduces a new dataset and evaluation logic not defined in the spec, constituting a silent constitution drift and scope creep.

Task T006 mandates 'unconditional exponential backoff retry logic' in rcb_runner.py. Task T015 re-implements 'retry logic (exponential backoff, max 3 attempts)' in the same file. This redundancy suggests a potential split in responsibility that may lead to inconsistent behavior or double-retry logic, violating the deterministic nature of FR-006 which requires a single, defined retry mechanism.

Task T007 creates rubric_checker.py to validate weight sums. Task T012 re-implements rubric_checker.py to raise ValueError on weight deviation. This duplication of implementation tasks for the same file and logic creates ambiguity in the deliverable definition and risks inconsistent validation logic if the tasks are not perfectly synchronized.
